query:
SELECT
                CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) as "total_uploads!",
                CAST(COALESCE(SUM(duration_ms), 0) AS BIGINT) as "total_duration_ms!",
                CAST(COALESCE(SUM(size_bytes), 0) AS BIGINT) as "total_size_bytes!"
            FROM voice_usage_stats
            WHERE room_id = $1
